etymology.description: еҲҖ(еҲҖ) (dДҒo, "knife") with a component resembling the tip of a blade дәЎ
etymology.interpretation: The character еҢ„(gГ i) originally depicted a knife еҲҖ(еҲҖ) (dДҒo, "knife") with a tip or component resembling the tip of a blade дәЎ. The original meaning is thought to be related to 'damage', though it is not fully clear.
